prompt: I run a weekly podcast on B2B SaaS topics. My workflow is: record interview, transcribe, edit audio, write show notes, create 5 social posts, upload to the hosting platform, and publish. I spend way too much time on show notes and social posts and the quality is inconsistent. I want AI to help but I need to stay in control of the final editorial decisions. Help me build a repeatable process for this.

assertions.text: Generated SKILL.md contains both 'name:' and 'description:' YAML frontmatter fields
working-agreements.md explicitly lists editorial approval or final sign-off as human-owned (not just implied)
Audio editing is identified as non-delegable to AI in working-agreements.md
working-agreements.md contains 'STOP' with at least one specific trigger condition
phase-prompts.md contains specific descriptions of what 'analysis done' and 'execution done' look like for this domain
